description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Packages that runs on pull requests, pushes to main, and published releases. Use an ubuntu-22.04 job with a matrix strategy to build Debian packages for multiple distributions, including Debian unstable, trixie, bookworm, bullseye, and Ubuntu noble, jammy, focal. For each distribution, checkout the code, determine the PPA to upload to based on the reference, generate a Debian changelog, build the package, and upload the artifact and package to Launchpad PPAs.
